name: Code Analysis
description: Skill for analyzing source code structure, patterns, and potential issues.
instructions: Analyze the provided code for structure, patterns, potential bugs, and adherence to best practices. Provide actionable feedback.

sub_skills.name: Bug Detection
sub_skills.description: Identifies potential bugs and runtime errors in code.
sub_skills.instructions: Scan the code for potential null pointer exceptions, race conditions, off-by-one errors, and other common bugs.

sub_skills.name: Style Check
sub_skills.description: Checks code against style guidelines and conventions.
sub_skills.instructions: Review the code for consistent naming, formatting, and adherence to language-specific style guides.
